testcase.name: E2E — Health > GET /v1/health returns 200
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health does not require an Authorization header
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health returns a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health returns dataset_type of 'health_status'
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health event_type is 'health_check'
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health attribute.status is 'ok'
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health attribute.uptime is a non-negative number
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health attribute.buffer_size is a non-negative integer
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health attribute.last_poll_at is null or a valid ISO timestamp
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health time_object.timestamp is a valid ISO timestamp
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with no Authorization header
E2E — Auth enforcement > 401 response body has success: false
E2E — Auth enforcement > 401 response body has error: 'Unauthorized'
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with an incorrect token
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 when the Bearer prefix is missing
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 when the auth scheme is not 'Bearer'
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with a completely malformed Authorization header
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with an empty Authorization header value
E2E — Auth enforcement > /v1/stats enforces auth
E2E — Auth enforcement > /v1/history enforces auth
E2E — Auth enforcement > /v1/live/region/NSW1 enforces auth
E2E — Auth enforcement > /v1/live/price enforces auth
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > 200 response dataset_type is 'live_snapshot_collection'
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > 200 response event_type is 'snapshot_collection'
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > 503 response body has success: false and an error message
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=NEM returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=WEM returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=NEM 200 response dataset_type is 'live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=NEM 200 response event_type is 'network_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=INVALID returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=INVALID response body has success: false
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=INVALID response body has error: 'Invalid network'
E2E — GET /v1/live (network-level snapshot) > ?network=nem (lowercase) returns 400 — network codes are case-sensitive
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW1 200 response has attribute.region === 'NSW1'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW1 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW1 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/QLD1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/QLD1 200 response has attribute.region === 'QLD1'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/QLD1 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/QLD1 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/VIC1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/VIC1 200 response has attribute.region === 'VIC1'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/VIC1 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/VIC1 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/SA1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/SA1 200 response has attribute.region === 'SA1'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/SA1 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/SA1 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/TAS1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/TAS1 200 response has attribute.region === 'TAS1'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/TAS1 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/TAS1 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/WEM returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/WEM 200 response has attribute.region === 'WEM'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/WEM 200 response has attribute.network set
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/WEM 200 response dataset_type is 'regional_live_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/INVALID returns 404
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/INVALID response body error is 'Unknown region'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/nsw1 returns 404
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/nsw1 response body error is 'Unknown region'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW returns 404
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/NSW response body error is 'Unknown region'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/AU1 returns 404
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/AU1 response body error is 'Unknown region'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/(empty string) returns 404
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > /v1/live/region/(empty string) response body error is 'Unknown region'
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > 200 response includes attribute.updated_at as a valid ISO timestamp
E2E — GET /v1/live/region/:region > 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > returns 200 or 503
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 200 response dataset_type is 'live_price_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 200 response event_type is 'regional_price_snapshot'
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 200 response attribute is an array of price entries
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 200 response each price entry has network, region, price_dollar_per_mwh, demand_mw
E2E — GET /v1/live/price > 503 response has success: false and error: 'Cache not yet warm'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?range=24h returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?range=24h response body has success: false
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?range=24h response body error is 'Invalid stats query'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?range=1h returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?range=1y returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=INVALID&range=7d returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=7d returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=7d 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=7d 200 response dataset_type is 'range_statistics'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=7d 200 response event_type is 'statistics_summary'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=30d returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=30d 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=30d 200 response dataset_type is 'range_statistics'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=30d 200 response event_type is 'statistics_summary'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=90d returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=90d 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=90d 200 response dataset_type is 'range_statistics'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > ?network=NEM&range=90d 200 response event_type is 'statistics_summary'
E2E — GET /v1/stats > defaults to network=NEM and range=7d when no query params provided
E2E — GET /v1/history > no query params returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > no query params error is 'Invalid history query'
E2E — GET /v1/history > missing metric returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > unknown metric returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > invalid interval '2h' returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > invalid interval '30m' returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > invalid network returns 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=generation_mw with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=generation_mw 200 response attribute.metric equals 'generation_mw'
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=price with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=price 200 response attribute.metric equals 'price'
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=emissions_volume with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=emissions_volume 200 response attribute.metric equals 'emissions_volume'
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=emission_intensity with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=emission_intensity 200 response attribute.metric equals 'emission_intensity'
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=demand_mw with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=demand_mw 200 response attribute.metric equals 'demand_mw'
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=renewables_pct with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > metric=renewables_pct 200 response attribute.metric equals 'renewables_pct'
E2E — GET /v1/history > interval=5m with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > interval=1h with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > interval=1d with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response is a valid ADAGE envelope
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response dataset_type is 'historical_series'
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response event_type is 'history_series'
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response attribute.series is an array
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response attribute.interval matches the requested interval
E2E — GET /v1/history > 200 response attribute.range matches the requested range
E2E — CORS headers > GET /v1/health includes access-control-allow-origin
E2E — CORS headers > GET /v1/live includes access-control-allow-origin
E2E — CORS headers > preflight OPTIONS /v1/live returns 200 or 204
E2E — Content-Type header > GET /v1/health response Content-Type is application/json
E2E — Content-Type header > GET /v1/live response Content-Type is application/json
E2E — Content-Type header > error responses also return application/json
